title: Land care campaign promotes sustainable farming practices
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Small and emerging farmers from across the Dr Beyers Naudé municipal area attended an informative land care awareness campaign at Alex Laing Hall on Thursday 2 October.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Small and emerging farmers from across the Dr Beyers Naudé municipal area attended an informative land care awareness campaign at Alex Laing Hall on Thursday 2 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The event, hosted by the Department of Agriculture, focused on sustainable farming practices, land conservation, and responsible resource use."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Farmers were educated on land degradation, the Conservation of Agricultural Resources Act (Cara), and disaster risk reduction.","html":"Farmers were educated on land degradation, the Conservation of Agricultural Resources Act (Cara), and disaster risk reduction."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Councillor Xolile Galada encouraged more women to enter the farming sector, saying even small-scale backyard gardens or keeping a few livestock can make a difference.","html":"Councillor Xolile Galada encouraged more women to enter the farming sector, saying even small-scale backyard gardens or keeping a few livestock can make a difference."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He urged emerging farmers to unite, work together, and approach farming with patience, passion and commitment.","html":"He urged emerging farmers to unite, work together, and approach farming with patience, passion and commitment."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Provincial Land Care co-ordinator Mlungiseleli Tuswa emphasised that “agriculture is the backbone of the Eastern Cape economy” and highlighted the importance of veld management, water care, and the removal of alien plant species.","html":"Provincial Land Care co-ordinator Mlungiseleli Tuswa emphasised that “agriculture is the backbone of the Eastern Cape economy” and highlighted the importance of veld management, water care, and the removal of alien plant species."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Junior Land Care programme was also promoted to instil conservation awareness among the youth.","html":"The Junior Land Care programme was also promoted to instil conservation awareness among the youth."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"District Director Thozamile Lukhalo outlined land reform and redistribution policies, encouraging farmers to apply for agricultural support programmes, including livestock and crop production initiatives.","html":"District Director Thozamile Lukhalo outlined land reform and redistribution policies, encouraging farmers to apply for agricultural support programmes, including livestock and crop production initiatives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Application forms are available at all Department of Agriculture offices and online until 10 October.","html":"Application forms are available at all Department of Agriculture offices and online until 10 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Land care campaign promotes sustainable farming practices
